description: Whitelist of Klang Valley zones GigShift can recommend. Do not remove entries; adding new ones is safe. GLM is instructed to only recommend zones from this list.

zones.label: KLCC
zones.notes: KLCC towers, Suria mall, Bukit Bintang adjacent; tourist demand, business hours peak.

zones.label: Bukit Bintang
zones.notes: Pavilion mall, entertainment district; late-night demand.

zones.label: Bangsar / Bangsar South
zones.notes: Upper-middle residential + F&B cluster; dinner peak; weekend brunch.

zones.label: Mid Valley / KL Sentral
zones.notes: Mall + major transit hub; all-day demand; event-driven surges.

zones.label: Sunway Pyramid / Bandar Sunway
zones.notes: Mall + university area; evening + weekend peak.

zones.label: Cheras
zones.notes: Residential dense area; local commute demand.

zones.label: KLIA / KLIA2
zones.notes: Main international airport ~55km from KL center; long-haul fares but deadhead risk if return is empty.

zones.label: Shah Alam
zones.notes: Commute and logistics; weekday AM/PM peak.

zones.label: Cyberjaya / Putrajaya
zones.notes: Tech hub + federal offices; weekday commute; quiet weekends.

zones.label: Kota Damansara / TTDI
zones.notes: Affluent residential + F&B cluster; dinner peak.
